ground_truth.title: Cosmily - Product Comparison
ground_truth.main_content: Product Comparison - How it works: 1. Find the product you want to compare using the Product Finder. 2. Click the Compare button on the product page. 3. Do the same for the second product and see the results. The page features two product slots labeled 'Product #1' and 'Product #2', both linking to the Product Finder. Get an account - it’s free. We can help you find the right products for your skin. Personalized results. Follow the experts. INGREDIENTS CHECKER. CREATE YOUR OWN ROUTINE. Information on Cosmily is not medical advice and is provided for informational purposes. Product analysis is based on public information about formulation and chemical makeup. Please discuss medical concerns with a doctor.
